allow:
Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(interactions\): scalable entity search, quick log modal, lead interaction support, voice disambiguation

Interactions System:
- GET /api/interactions/targets/search — ranked search API \(mobile exact > prefix > name > ID\)
- EntitySearchSelect component — type-first async search with debounce, keyboard nav, pagination
- QuickLogModal — lightweight per-row interaction logging \(Customers, Brokers, Pipeline\)
- InteractionsView refactored — replaced static dropdowns with async search, added Lead support
- Converted leads filtered from search \(customer is master record post-conversion\)
- Pipeline lead cards now show source/campaign details
- Added meeting and site_visit interaction types

Voice Disambiguation:
- Added 6 new sales team reps to Deepgram voice dictionary \(Iram Riaz, Imran Younas, Samia Rashid, Syed Naeem, Syed Ali Zaib, Iram Aslam\)
- Context-aware name disambiguation for ambiguous names \(two Irams\)
- Resolution rules: self-exclusion, direct reports, hierarchy level, title hints
- REP_HIERARCHY mapping for org-chart-aware task assignment

Written-By: Malik Amin
EOF
\)")

Bash(git tag -a prod-16feb2026 -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Production release 16 Feb 2026

Includes:
- Analytics Engine Restructure \(full analytics dashboard\)
- Interactions System: scalable entity search, quick log modal, lead support
- Voice disambiguation for 16 sales team reps
- Phase 9: enhanced CRM schema, rep isolation, lookup CRUD, duplicate detection
- Phase 10: 6 new sales team users under Faisal CCO hierarchy
- Task Management: Asana-style modal, Kanban, Timeline, voice name dictionary
- Converted leads filtered from interaction search \(customer = master record\)

Deployed to: DigitalOcean production
Previous production: AnalyticsEngineRestructure
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: interaction logging parity, timestamp display, task-type casing normalization

Interactions:
- QuickLogModal + InteractionsView now submit identical payloads \(null empty strings\)
- Toast notification on successful interaction log from all entry points
- Date columns show date+time \(toLocaleString\) in Interactions list, Customer report, Broker report

Tasks:
- Task model defaults normalized: GENERAL→general, MEDIUM→medium, TODO→pending
- One-time auto-migration lowercases legacy task_type values in DB
- Case-insensitive task_type filter in get_tasks, status lookups
- Bulk-import duplicate task creation uses lowercase types

Written-By: Malik Amin
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: subtask duplication in task lists, spoke-on contact tracking, DO deploy guardrails

- Filter subtasks \(parent_task_id IS NOT NULL\) from get_tasks\(\), get_my_tasks\(\),
  get_task_summary\(\) so they only appear inside parent task detail, not as
  standalone entries in lists/dashboard/department views
- Atomic subtask creation: pass parent_task_id directly to create_task\(\) instead
  of setting it post-commit \(eliminates race condition\)
- Add "Spoke On" contact number selector for interactions when entity has
  multiple phone numbers \(additional_mobiles\)
- Show additional_mobiles in pipeline cards, lead detail, QuickLogModal
- Add DigitalOcean co-hosting guardrail to CLAUDE.md and deploy playbook
- Add HANDOFF_NOTES.md for session continuity

Authored-By: Malik Amin
EOF
\)")
Bash(__NEW_LINE_ed6b07a23f92d4a5__ echo "=== IMMUTABILITY: Edit disbursed record ===")
Bash(__NEW_LINE_ed6b07a23f92d4a5__ echo "=== CREATE 2nd record for cancel test ===")
